title: Text Spacing
content:
### CSS Text Spacing

Text spacing properties control gaps between characters, words, lines, and indentation.

---

### Letter Spacing

Controls space **between characters**:

```css
letter-spacing: normal;     /* Default */
letter-spacing: 2px;        /* Expanded */
letter-spacing: -1px;       /* Condensed */
letter-spacing: 0.1em;      /* Relative to font size */
```

---

### Word Spacing

Controls space **between words**:

```css
word-spacing: normal;     /* Default */
word-spacing: 5px;        /* More space between words */
word-spacing: -2px;       /* Less space */
```

---

### Line Height

Controls space **between lines**:

```css
line-height: normal;    /* Default (~1.2) */
line-height: 1.6;      /* Recommended for readability */
line-height: 24px;     /* Fixed height */
line-height: 150%;     /* Percentage of font size */
line-height: 2;        /* Double spacing */
```

**Best:** Use unitless values (`1.5`) so line-height scales with font-size.

---

### Text Indent

Indents the **first line** of a block:

```css
text-indent: 30px;        /* Indent first line */
text-indent: -20px;       /* Hanging indent (outdent) */
text-indent: 10%;         /* Percentage of parent width */
text-indent: 2em;         /* Two character widths */
```

---

### White Space

Controls how whitespace is handled:

| Value | Effect |
|-------|--------|
| `normal` | Collapses whitespace, wraps text |
| `nowrap` | Collapses whitespace, no wrapping |
| `pre` | Preserves whitespace (like `<pre>`) |
| `pre-wrap` | Preserves whitespace, wraps text |
| `pre-line` | Preserves newlines, collapses spaces |
| `break-spaces` | Like `pre-wrap`, breaks at spaces |

```css
.pre {
  white-space: pre;
}

.no-wrap {
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
```

---

> **Readability Tip:** Use `line-height: 1.6` for body text and `letter-spacing: 1px` for uppercase headings.
